What We Do

OUR
SERVICES

Every job done with professional-grade tools, accurate diagnostics, and zero shortcuts.

01

General Repair & Maintenance

Oil changes, fluid services, inspections, filters, belts, hoses — complete maintenance for all vehicles.

02

Engine Diagnostics & Tune-Up

Advanced scanning, check-engine investigations, drivability issues, and full engine tune-ups.

03

Brake & Suspension Service

Pads, rotors, callipers, bearings, struts, shocks — safety-first repairs done correctly.

04

Tire Service & Alignment

Tire installs, seasonal changeovers, balancing, flat repairs, and precision wheel alignment.

05

Electrical & No-Start Issues

Battery, alternator, starter, charging, warning lights — full electrical diagnosis and repair.

06

Insurance Claim Repairs

Accident documentation, insurer estimates, supplemental appraisals, and complete repairs.

Why Choose Us

BUILT
DIFFERENT

Westside handles the jobs other shops avoid. Complex diagnostics, insurance repairs, tough mechanical problems — we have the expertise and tools to handle it all.

Expert Diagnostics

Advanced scanning to find the root cause fast — accurate repairs that don't come back.

Insurance Claim Support

Full support from photos and estimates through adjuster communication to completed repair.

No Hidden Fees

Clear written estimates before any work starts — no surprises, no upsells without approval.

All Makes & Models

Daily drivers, imports, trucks, performance vehicles — every vehicle gets the same expert care.
